config_schema.doc: Azure AI Foundry API base URL (e.g. https://{instance_name}.openai.azure.com)
config_schema.name: base_url

config_schema.doc: Azure AI Foundry deployment name for the model to use
config_schema.name: deployment_name

config_schema.doc: Azure AI Foundry API version to use (e.g. 2024-06-01)
config_schema.name: api_version
